title: Vijaygarh Fort
tagline: Vijaygarh Fort — heritage city of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Vijaygarh Fort is a historic hill fort located near Mau Kalan village in the Chatra block of Sonbhadra district, Uttar Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Vijaygarh Fort is a historic hill fort located near Mau Kalan village in the Chatra block of Sonbhadra district, Uttar Pradesh, India. The fort is situated approximately 30 kilometres southeast of Robertsganj near the Dhandhraul Dam on the Chatra–Siltham road. Located within the rugged terrain of the Kaimur Range, the fort is known for its archaeological remains, rock inscriptions, perennial ponds, temples, cave paintings, and its association with the Hindi fantasy novel Chandrakanta by Devaki Nandan Khatri.

topPlaces.name: Dhanraul Dam
topPlaces.description: Dhanraul Dam is also known as Dhandhraul Dam. It is located about 23 km from Robertsganj on the Robertsganj-Churk road, in Sonbhadra district, Uttar Pradesh, India.

items.note: Dhanraul Dam is also known as Dhandhraul Dam. It is located about 23 km from Robertsganj on the Robertsganj-Churk road, in Sonbhadra district, Uttar Pradesh, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vijaygarh Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vijaygarh Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vijaygarh Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lal Bahadur Shastri Airport, Varanasi (103 km) and the nearest railway station is Varanasi Junction (86 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vijaygarh Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vijaygarh Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vijaygarh Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Vijaygarh Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vijaygarh Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dhanraul Dam.
